title: pedilonum tubiflorum
intro: Pedilonum tubiflorum, also known as the Chinese Angelica or Qī Xīn, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer activities. The health benefits of Pedilonum tubiflorum include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and alleviating symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, infusions, and dried root extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
